posts.author: desmonda (Andrew Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am using Dashboard to report information to our local Council.
One frustration i’ve had is the limited viewing space in the title to provide context.
I’ve just explored the option to add the information via. test in the unit field.
Unfortunately, the Numbers Widget does not add units to the “Count” option.
Can this be looked at.

Thanks.
